emails.subject: Re: Waiver
emails.body: Re: Waiver Hi Gregg, Per your request: See ya, Kay From: Gregg Penman on 10/20/2000 03:08 PM

emails.subject: Re: Waiver
emails.body: I understand completely. Those ear infections can be very painful. Nothing can get to you like your kid in pain. If it makes you feel any better I have a 20year old (I can't believe it) and a 6 year old (even more unbelievable), and both have a lot of allergies and sinus infections, etc. My oldest also had a lot of ear infections, and it seemed to be painful. But she out grew the problem. I expect to be in town Mon-Thurs, with high hopes of taking Friday off to join my husband at his officer's meeting in San Antonio. Kay From: Gregg Penman on 10/22/2000 11:02 AM
